changelog: Phase 7.4 v2: Staff Management v2. New shift_swap_requests table + 5 DB methods (createShiftSwapRequest, listShiftSwapRequests, offerToTakeShift, approveShiftSwap [transactional reassignment], denyShiftSwap, cancelShiftSwap). Single endpoint POST /api/shift-swap-action.php covers all 5 lifecycle transitions (request/offer/approve/deny/cancel) with role-gated approve/deny. New CLI scripts/payroll-export.php emits a per-employee CSV (hours / base_pay / tips_pooled / tips_manual / total) for a --period=YYYY-MM or --from/--to range. Migration sql/staff-v2-migration.sql also adds tips_distribution_rules + tips_manual_overrides for per-period override of the default equal-by-hours split. Docs in docs/staff-v2.md.
